entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to A. flavus and aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut, acting as a constraint to production in West Africa.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the groundnut genotypes were tested.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for seed infection and aflatoxin production in groundnuts.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The ability of certain groundnut genotypes to resist infection by A. flavus.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The capacity of the fungus or the host-fungus interaction to produce aflatoxin.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where testing sites were located.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country in West Africa where testing sites were located.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A country in West Africa where testing sites were located.

entities.description: A specific testing site located in Niger.

entities.description: A specific testing site located in Niger.

entities.description: A specific testing site located in Niger.

entities.name: GENES FOR RESISTANCE
entities.description: Genetic elements that confer resistance to A. flavus infection.

entities.name: SEED INFECTION
